users_contact_method_chk.name: users_contact_method_chk
users_contact_method_chk.value: email IS NOT NULL OR phone_number IS NOT NULL

urm_unique_global_idx.name: urm_unique_global_idx
urm_unique_global_idx.where: store_fk IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

urm_unique_store_idx.name: urm_unique_store_idx
urm_unique_store_idx.where: store_fk IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

urm_primary_global_idx.name: urm_primary_global_idx
urm_primary_global_idx.where: store_fk IS NULL AND is_primary = true AND deleted_at IS NULL

urm_primary_store_idx.name: urm_primary_store_idx
urm_primary_store_idx.where: store_fk IS NOT NULL AND is_primary = true AND deleted_at IS NULL

store_operating_hours_time_validity_chk.name: store_operating_hours_time_validity_chk
store_operating_hours_time_validity_chk.value:
(is_closed = true AND opening_time IS NULL AND closing_time IS NULL)
        OR
        (is_closed = false AND opening_time IS NOT NULL AND closing_time IS NOT NULL AND opening_time < closing_time)

roles_code_store_idx.name: roles_code_store_idx
roles_code_store_idx.where: deleted_at IS NULL AND store_fk IS NOT NULL

roles_name_store_idx.name: roles_name_store_idx
roles_name_store_idx.where: deleted_at IS NULL AND store_fk IS NOT NULL

roles_code_global_idx.name: roles_code_global_idx
roles_code_global_idx.where: deleted_at IS NULL AND store_fk IS NULL

address_one_default_idx.name: address_one_default_idx
address_one_default_idx.where: is_default_address = true AND deleted_at IS NULL

address_one_billing_idx.name: address_one_billing_idx
address_one_billing_idx.where: is_billing_address = true AND deleted_at IS NULL

tax_registrations_active_idx.name: tax_registrations_active_idx
tax_registrations_active_idx.where: deleted_at IS NULL AND effective_to IS NULL

tax_registrations_date_range_chk.name: tax_registrations_date_range_chk
tax_registrations_date_range_chk.value: effective_from <= effective_to OR effective_to IS NULL

tax_rate_master_active_idx.name: tax_rate_master_active_idx
tax_rate_master_active_idx.where: is_active = true AND deleted_at IS NULL AND effective_to IS NULL

tax_rate_master_date_range_chk.name: tax_rate_master_date_range_chk
tax_rate_master_date_range_chk.value: effective_from <= effective_to OR effective_to IS NULL

tax_rate_master_components_positive.name: tax_rate_master_components_positive
tax_rate_master_components_positive.value: (component1_rate IS NULL OR component1_rate >= 0) AND (component2_rate IS NULL OR component2_rate >= 0) AND (component3_rate IS NULL OR component3_rate >= 0) AND additional_rate >= 0

daily_tax_summary_amounts_positive_chk.name: daily_tax_summary_amounts_positive_chk
daily_tax_summary_amounts_positive_chk.value: total_taxable_amount >= 0 AND total_cgst_amount >= 0 AND total_sgst_amount >= 0 AND total_tax_collected >= 0

transaction_tax_lines_total_tax_chk.name: transaction_tax_lines_total_tax_chk
transaction_tax_lines_total_tax_chk.value: total_tax_amount = cgst_amount + sgst_amount + igst_amount + utgst_amount + cess_amount

transaction_tax_lines_amounts_positive_c.name: transaction_tax_lines_amounts_positive_chk
transaction_tax_lines_amounts_positive_c.value: taxable_amount >= 0 AND cgst_amount >= 0 AND sgst_amount >= 0 AND igst_amount >= 0 AND utgst_amount >= 0 AND cess_amount >= 0 AND total_tax_amount >= 0

code_value_code_category_global_idx.name: code_value_code_category_global_idx
code_value_code_category_global_idx.where: deleted_at IS NULL AND store_fk IS NULL

code_value_code_category_store_idx.name: code_value_code_category_store_idx
code_value_code_category_store_idx.where: deleted_at IS NULL AND store_fk IS NOT NULL

volumes_no_self_reference_chk.name: volumes_no_self_reference_chk
volumes_no_self_reference_chk.value: base_volume_fk IS NULL OR base_volume_fk <> id

communication_active_deleted_consistent_.name: communication_active_deleted_consistent_chk
communication_active_deleted_consistent_.value: NOT (is_active = true AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL)

communication_at_least_one_value_chk.name: communication_at_least_one_value_chk
communication_at_least_one_value_chk.value:
(
    email IS NOT NULL OR
    fax IS NOT NULL OR
    phone_number IS NOT NULL OR
    website IS NOT NULL
  )

communication_dial_country_requires_phon.name: communication_dial_country_requires_phone_chk

contact_person_one_primary_idx.name: contact_person_one_primary_idx
contact_person_one_primary_idx.where: is_primary = true AND deleted_at IS NULL

plans_no_self_upgrade_chk.name: plans_no_self_upgrade_chk
plans_no_self_upgrade_chk.value: allow_to_upgrade_fk IS NULL OR allow_to_upgrade_fk != id

plans_no_self_downgrade_chk.name: plans_no_self_downgrade_chk
plans_no_self_downgrade_chk.value: allow_to_downgrade_fk IS NULL OR allow_to_downgrade_fk != id
